implications: **Calf protection protocol for next 7-14 days**: Limit running to Z1-Z2, max 60min duration; substitute cycling (60-90min @ 180-210W) for aerobic volume on compromised days

**Intensity session rules**: Threshold/tempo work permissible IF treadmill-based (controlled grade/pace) AND calf asymptomatic during warmup; outdoor threshold deferred until pain-free 10km run achieved
**Sprint work contraindicated short-term**: 100m repeats require explosive calf contraction—defer until 14 days pain-free or clearance from movement assessment
**Long-run rebuild strategy**: Cap at 60min until calf fully resolved; use treadmill for progressive duration (60→75→90min) before returning to outdoor terrain with elevation
**Cycling as primary aerobic driver**: Schedule 2-3x/week, 60-90min, 180-210W to maintain aerobic base while offloading calf; pair with same-day strength to consolidate load days
**Strength training continuation**: Maintain 2x/week, 45-55min, but modify to avoid calf-dominant movements (reduce/eliminate calf raises, box jumps, plyometrics) until cleared
**Race proximity constraint (Flirt with Dirt 10k, Mar 28—5 days out)**: Current calf status makes this C-priority race high-risk; consider DNS or course recon at conversational pace only
